flags.message: The provisioned snapshot (2026-07-12.json) already contained the outcome of the case. The `ProceedingsandOrder` section lists the disposition ('The motion for leave to proceed in forma pauperis is denied, and the petition for a writ of habeas corpus is dismissed. See Rule 39.8.') dated Oct 20 2025. Per the prediction instructions, I noted this here so the evaluation can discount this cell, and I formulated the reasoning based strictly on the pre-decision facts rather than relying on this leaked outcome.
